channel.title: Schema on Ben Sigman
channel.description: Recent content in Schema on Ben Sigman

item.title: How I Gave Myself a Google Knowledge Panel
item.description:
A scroll-snap slide presentation of this guide lives at benobi.one/panel.html. If you just want the wow + the recipe, start there. The article below is the full manual.

Google Knowledge Panel Setup Guide

A step-by-step guide for getting a Google Knowledge Panel as an author/entrepreneur. Based on what worked for Ben Sigman’s setup.

1. Schema Markup (JSON-LD on your website)

Add this to the <head> of every page on your site. It tells Google exactly who you are in machine-readable format.
